'''dadomo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nickelbischofite|nickelbischofite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-d-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nickelbischofite|nickelbischofite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dadomo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dædemeth|dædemeth]] || [[word:dædemej|dædemej]] || [[word:dædemesh|dædemesh]] || [[word:dædeme|dædeme]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dadodomoth|dadodomoth]] || [[word:dadodomoj|dadodomoj]] || [[word:dadodomosh|dadodomosh]] || [[word:dadodomo|dadodomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dadomoth|dadomoth]] || [[word:dadomoj|dadomoj]] || [[word:dadomosh|dadomosh]] || [[word:dadomo|dadomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dadofmoth|dadofmoth]] || [[word:dadofmoj|dadofmoj]] || [[word:dadofmosh|dadofmosh]] || [[word:dadofmof|dadofmof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dadomotho|dadomotho]] || [[word:dadomojo|dadomojo]] || [[word:dadomosho|dadomosho]] || [[word:dadomoko|dadomoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dadomoth|dadomoth]] || [[word:dadomoj|dadomoj]] || [[word:dadomosh|dadomosh]] || [[word:dadomo|dadomo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dadomothol|dadomothol]] || [[word:dadomojol|dadomojol]] || [[word:dadomoshol|dadomoshol]] || [[word:dadomokol|dadomokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dadomothotho|dadomothotho]] || [[word:dadomojojo|dadomojojo]] || [[word:dadomoshosho|dadomoshosho]] || [[word:dadomoko|dadomoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dadomothon|dadomothon]] || [[word:dadomojon|dadomojon]] || [[word:dadomoshon|dadomoshon]] || [[word:dadomokon|dadomokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dadomothoro|dadomothoro]] || [[word:dadomojoro|dadomojoro]] || [[word:dadomoshoro|dadomoshoro]] || [[word:dadomokoro|dadomokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
